Report.Name: Sales aceleration - Details
Report.Description: Informe de aceleración de ventas - Detalles

With.Name: Main
With.Cte: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: ProductSellThrough --MAX(SalesAccelerations.ProductSellThrough) AS ProductSellThrough -Expression: RootProductSellThrough --MAX(SalesAccelerations.RootProductSellThrough) AS RootProductSellThrough -Expression: DaysInStore --MAX(SalesAccelerations.DaysInStore) AS DaysInStore -Expression: InitialStock --SUM(SalesAccelerations.InitialStock) AS InitialStock -Expression: ActualStock --SUM(SalesAccelerations.ActualStock) AS ActualStock -Expression: PendingReceptions --SUM(SalesAccelerations.PendingReceptions) AS PendingReceptions -Expression: Sales --SUM(SalesAccelerations.Sales) AS Sales -Expression: WarehouseStock --SUM(SalesAccelerations.WarehouseStock) AS WarehouseStock }} FROM Fact.SalesAccelerations {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Table: SalesAccelerations -On:PointOfSaleId-PointOfSaleId }} {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Table: SalesAccelerations -On: ProductId-ProductId }} {{ GroupBy -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte }}
With.Query: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: PointsOfSale -Dimension: Products -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: ProductSellThrough --ProductSellThrough -Expression: RootProductSellThrough --RootProductSellThrough -Expression: DaysInStore --DaysInStore -Expression: InitialStock --InitialStock -Expression: ActualStock --ActualStock -Expression: PendingReceptions --PendingReceptions -Expression: Sales --Sales -Expression: WarehouseStock --WarehouseStock -WhenRequestTotals --Default ---COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount --Expression: ProductSellThrough ---MAX(ProductSellThrough) OVER() AS TotalProductSellThrough --Expression: RootProductSellThrough ---MAX(RootProductSellThrough) OVER() AS TotalRootProductSellThrough --Expression: DaysInStore ---MAX(DaysInStore) OVER() AS TotalDaysInStore --Expression: InitialStock ---SUM(InitialStock) OVER() AS TotalInitialStock --Expression: ActualStock ---SUM(ActualStock) OVER() AS TotalActualStock --Expression: PendingReceptions ---SUM(PendingReceptions) OVER() AS TotalPendingReceptions --Expression: Sales ---SUM(Sales) OVER() AS TotalSales --Expression: WarehouseStock ---SUM(WarehouseStock) OVER() AS TotalWarehouseStock }} FROM GroupedCte {{ OrderBy -Dimension: PointsOfSale -Dimension: Products }} {{Pagination}}
